message:
refactor(db): rename migrate_to_latest to migrate_to_latest_base and explicit column select

Two schema hygiene improvements:

Migration API rename:
- legacy.rs and lib.rs: rename schema::migrate_to_latest() calls to
  schema::migrate_to_latest_base() to match the updated asupersync
  schema module API (base migrations only, excluding extension migrations)

Query specificity:
- queries.rs list_product_projects: replace SELECT p.* with explicit
  column list (p.id, p.slug, p.human_key, p.created_at) to prevent
  breakage if columns are added to the projects table and to make the
  query's data contract self-documenting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
